summary: Iteration 47: Tested Admin Tree View and New Adult (18-25) Signup Flow features. All features verified working correctly.

admin_dashboard_loads.description: Admin dashboard loads with revenue metrics (MRR, ARR, Total Revenue, MoM Growth), platform overview tiles, and viral growth metrics

admin_tree_view_toggle.description: Tree button toggles between list and tree view modes. Button shows highlighted gold background when active.

admin_tree_view_sections.description: Tree view groups users into Administrators, Benefactors & Their Beneficiaries (53), and Unlinked Beneficiaries sections

admin_tree_view_expand.description: Expanding a benefactor shows their linked beneficiaries underneath with proper indentation. John Doe shows 1 beneficiary (Jane Smith) with 'Pending' status and 'Sister' relation

admin_stats_linked_beneficiaries.description: Backend /admin/users returns linked_beneficiaries array for each benefactor. Backend /admin/stats returns avg_beneficiaries_per_benefactor and beneficiaries_converted metrics

new_adult_dob_detection.description: Entering DOB for age 18-25 (e.g., 2006-05-15 = age 20) correctly identifies user as New Adult

new_adult_role_banner.description: When benefactor role is selected by a New Adult (18-25), a purple info banner appears explaining New Adult tier and parent enrollment
new_adult_role_banner.banner_text: As a New Adult (18-25), you'll set up your parents as beneficiaries so they can access your POA and Living Will if needed. You qualify for our New Adult tier — no additional verification required.

new_adult_skips_marital_eligibility.description: New Adult signup flow skips marital status and eligibility steps entirely. Steps go from Role directly to Parent/Guardian 1

new_adult_parent_step_text.description: Parent/Guardian step shows correct text: 'Give them access to your Power of Attorney, Living Will, and estate — so they can act on your behalf if something happens.'

context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin tree view feature fully working: Tree button toggles view, users grouped into Administrators/Benefactors & Their Beneficiaries/Unlinked Beneficiaries sections, benefactors can be expanded to show linked beneficiaries with indentation. New Adult (18-25) signup flow verified: DOB triggers isNewAdult detection, purple banner appears on Role step, flow skips to Parent/Guardian steps (no marital/eligibility), Parent step shows correct POA/Living Will text.
